summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P0 Complete Invoice Workflow Fix. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend invoice editor, PDF export, project navigation, invoice editing rules, and project dashboard financial sync all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST- prefixed invoices and projects during testing (cleaned up automatically)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice workflow P0 fully tested. Key test invoice INV-1007 (ID: 2d83596a-102a-4c35-8618-fbfb11928b73) is PartiallyPaid with project. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_invoice_workflow_p0.py covers all 7 items from original problem statement.

invoice_header_go_to_project.notes: Button visible when project_id exists, navigates to /projects/{id}. Button hidden when no project.

invoice_pdf_export.notes: GET /api/finance/invoices/{id}/pdf returns valid PDF with Cyrillic support (DejaVu font). Downloaded successfully in browser.

invoice_editing_sent_allowed.notes: Sent invoices can edit: notes, dates, counterparty, lines

invoice_editing_partiallypaid_allowed.notes: PartiallyPaid invoices editable. Lines edit recalculates remaining_amount correctly.

invoice_editing_overdue_allowed.notes: Overdue invoices editable (same rules as Sent)

invoice_editing_paid_blocked.notes: Paid invoices return 400 error with Bulgarian message

invoice_editing_cancelled_blocked.notes: Cancelled invoices return 400 error with Bulgarian message

project_dashboard_paid_unpaid_totals.notes: Dashboard uses invoice.paid_amount/remaining_amount for totals (fixed from old total_ex_vat)

project_dashboard_balance_income.notes: Balance.income = sum of paid_amounts from project invoices

project_dashboard_partial_payment_sync.notes: Partial payment immediately reflects in project financials

project_dashboard_full_payment_sync.notes: Full payment immediately reflects: paid=total, unpaid=0

project_dashboard_payment_removal_sync.notes: Removing payment updates project dashboard: paid=0, unpaid=total

project_invoice_table_columns.notes: Table shows: №, Клиент, Дата, Падеж, Статус, Общо, Платено, Остатък

project_invoice_table_navigation.notes: Clicking invoice row navigates to invoice editor

status_consistency_partiallypaid.notes: PartiallyPaid shows same paid_amount in both invoice detail and project dashboard

status_consistency_paid.notes: Paid invoice shows 0 remaining in both views
